name: clean liver MRI — LR-1 HCC surveillance

report.technique: Multiphase liver MRI with extracellular gadolinium contrast.
report.comparison: Liver MRI 6 months ago — no LI-RADS observation.
report.findings: Cirrhotic liver morphology with mild splenomegaly. No discrete arterially hyperenhancing mass. No washout. Patent main portal vein and hepatic veins.
